title: Fine 3D Doors
description:
3D models for both Vanilla Doors and Nature's Spirit Doors, with doorknobs and hings.
More Modded Doors COMING SOON!
body:
![Banner that says Fine 3D Doors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d520f060bcc2232b71206dc0f474c44bbc585883.png)


# **_Fine 3D!_**

Annoyed by some of the biome mods doors having 3D packs and others having nothing, I decided to do something about it. I present my first ever texture pack, "_Fine 3D Doors_". 


### **VANILLA DOORS ARE HERE!**

| Doors               | Status          |
| ------------------- | --------------- |
| Vanilla             | Completed ✔️    |
| [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit)     | Completed ✔️    |
| [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)    | Planned ❕       |


[Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) is an optional dependencie, you need to have it installed if you want it's doors. 
Even if it should work for every version, I've only tested it on 1.21.1. I will add more version as I test them. 



### <center> Find me on: </center>
<center>

  
[![Tumblr Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8e8ba3b765b5de229a206c09d35e5130300aae2.png)](https://mrrougejr.tumblr.com/)

</center>

## Recommended
[Remodeled Doors 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/remodeled-doors). Add 3D vanilla doors and BOP 3D doors.
